data.intent: Create a privacy-preserving local LLM writing-style skill for named reusable profiles, example intake, neutral calibration, eval scaffolding, and profile inheritance.
Create the portable writing-style skill scaffold, baseline SKILL.md shell, artifact templates, conservative config defaults, and metadata alignment.

data.summary: Created skill/writing-style scaffold directories for templates, prompts, scripts, and eval cases.
Added valid writing-style SKILL.md scaffold with trigger description and placeholder guidance.
Added profile.md template with required front matter and profile body headings.
Added conservative config.json template for sanitization, neutral prompts, readiness, and naming defaults.
Added calibration-session.md template with source summary, sanitization, hypothesis, rounds, and pending decisions sections.
Added eval-case.md template with eval front matter and rubric sections.
Updated project metadata description and ignored generated Cicadas context.md.
Verified JSON template, skill validation, and empty dependency list; no database, framework, remote persistence, or runtime dependency was introduced.
Completed scaffold, skill shell, profile/config/session/eval templates, metadata update, and validation checks.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: Validated config JSON, validated skill front matter, and confirmed dependencies remain empty.

data.summary: Builder confirmed scaffold feature PR merge; applied local merge into initiative/writing-skill.

data.intent: Implement the complete writing-style skill workflow for profile creation, sanitization, calibration, saving, forking, invocation, settings changes, neutral prompts, and feedback rubric.

data.summary: Filled SKILL.md trigger rules and use guidance for profile creation, updating, forking, invocation, and settings.
Implemented create-profile instructions for naming, style-only explanation, example intake, sparse examples, and hypothesis review.
Implemented sanitization and privacy rules for treating examples as data, excluding source facts, and confirming retained terms.
Implemented calibration flow with neutral prompts, freeform feedback, optional scoring, summaries, and ready/experimental paths.
Implemented profile-save flow with preview, local Markdown profile writing, status, invocation examples, and change notes.
Implemented profile-fork flow with source loading, style diffing, comparison samples, and source mutation protection.
Implemented saved-profile invocation flow that separates style from task content and asks for missing facts.
Implemented settings-change flow with current/proposed values, privacy-risk confirmation, and unknown-key preservation.
Added neutral calibration prompts for email, text, report, narrative, and general-purpose categories.
Added feedback rubric covering style match, privacy leakage, instruction adherence, readiness, and human review.
Dry-run reviewed create, fork, invoke, settings, and privacy-confirmation paths for ambiguity and completeness.
Completed full writing-style workflow instructions, neutral calibration prompts, feedback rubric, dry-run review, and task reflection.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: Skill validation passed; checked create, fork, invoke, settings, privacy confirmation, prompt categories, and rubric coverage.

data.summary: Builder approved workflow feature boundary; applied local merge into initiative/writing-skill.

data.intent: Implement deterministic helper scripts for workspace initialization, profile/config validation, name normalization, privacy-risk warnings, fixtures, and test checks.

data.summary: Implemented init_workspace.py for config and data folders without overwriting existing config unless --force is used.
Implemented profile-name normalization with lowercase kebab-case recommendations and validation errors.
Implemented config load/default merge helper that preserves unknown keys while filling missing defaults.
Implemented validate_profile.py for front matter fields, status values, calibration mapping, and required Markdown headings.
Added --privacy-scan mode with heuristic warnings for known disallowed private/source-specific terms.
Added valid, invalid, and privacy-flag profile fixtures under tests/fixtures.
Added unittest coverage for workspace init, profile validation, config merge, name normalization, exit codes, and privacy warnings.
Verified exit codes: 0 for valid profile, 1 for invalid profile, 2 for missing profile/system read failure.
Reflect notes: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests ran 9 tests OK; init_workspace.py /tmp check exited 0; validate_profile valid exited 0; invalid exited 1; privacy scan flagged expected warnings.
Completed helper scripts, pure helper functions, profile fixtures, unittest coverage, privacy scan mode, exit-code validation, and task reflection.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests ran 9 tests OK; py_compile passed; validate_profile valid exited 0, invalid exited 1, missing file path covered as exit 2; privacy scan flagged expected fixture terms.

data.summary: Builder approved helper feature boundary; applied local merge into initiative/writing-skill.

data.intent: Create local eval spec copy, manifest, and representative eval cases for style match, privacy leakage, invocation, persistence, and inheritance.

data.summary: Adapted the active eval spec into skill/writing-style/evals/eval-spec.md for portable skill-local review.
Defined manifest.json with case id, category, profile fixture, prompt fixture, expected result type, labels, and privacy labels where relevant.
Added 5 style-match cases across email, text, report, narrative, and general categories.
Added 5 privacy leakage cases with explicit private_terms_must_not_include labels for names, clients, embedded instructions, internal terms, and custom prompts.
Added invocation cases for write, rewrite, missing-content prompting, and experimental-profile behavior.
Added inheritance cases including email-professional to email-neutral, report-concise to report-brief, and source-profile mutation protection.
Verified all 20 eval cases include user prompt, expected style signals, must-not-include terms, rubric, and passing criteria.
Reviewed eval cases against PRD, UX, and Tech Design; no blocking spec or implementation changes required before final validation.
Completed portable eval spec, 20-case manifest, style/privacy/invocation/persistence/inheritance cases, coverage validation, and task reflection.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: Manifest JSON validates; 20 manifest entries match 20 case files; required sections present in every case; category coverage is style_match=5, privacy_leakage=5, instruction_adherence=4, profile_persistence=3, inheritance=3; unittest suite still passes.

data.summary: Builder approved eval feature boundary; applied local merge into initiative/writing-skill.

data.intent: Write user and skill documentation, run final validation and dry runs, reconcile eval findings, check trigger scope, and prepare final feature review.

data.summary: Updated top-level README with product overview, structure, local storage model, quick start, and privacy expectations.
Added skill-level README with install/use examples, profile invocation examples, settings notes, eval notes, and privacy boundary.
Validation results: validate-skill passed; unittest discovery ran 9 tests OK; manifest JSON parsed; valid fixture profile validated; temp workspace init exited 0.
Manual dry-run review covered create-profile, fork-profile, invoke-profile, settings-change, and privacy-confirmation paths; no blocking ambiguities found.
Reviewed eval assets for blockers; manifest and cases align with PRD, UX, Tech, and no product/design/task changes are required before completion.
Checked trigger scope against create, fork, invoke, settings, ordinary one-off writing, and generic rewrite requests; trigger is bounded appropriately.
Verified docs, templates, prompts, scripts, eval assets, and README paths agree on storage, schema, readiness, and privacy defaults.
Final feature code review completed; no blocking findings. Remaining risk is normal human review of subjective style/eval quality.
Completed repository and skill documentation, final validation checks, representative workflow dry-run review, eval blocker review, trigger-scope check, consistency review, and final code review.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: validate-skill passed; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests ran 9 tests OK; manifest JSON parsed; valid fixture profile validated; temp workspace init succeeded; no blocking findings found.

data.summary: Builder approved final docs feature boundary; applied local merge into initiative/writing-skill.

data.intent: Add bundled profile storage and lookup guidance for online ChatGPT, Claude web, local Codex, and other media so saved profiles can travel with the skill.

data.summary: Added bundled profiles directory guidance for portable web-hosted profile storage.
Updated SKILL.md lookup order to check bundled profiles, local profile directory, then user-provided profile content.
Added medium-specific save and reupload instructions for Claude web, Claude Projects, ChatGPT Projects, Custom GPTs, local Codex, and unknown hosts.
Updated README/config/helper defaults for bundled profile storage and added test coverage for bundled_profile_directory.
Added bundled profile directory, lookup order, online-host persistence guidance, config default, and tests/docs for portable profile use across Claude, ChatGPT, and local Codex.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: validate-skill passed; config JSON parsed; unittest discovery ran 9 tests OK; reviewed instructions for bundled profiles and medium-specific upload/reupload guidance.
